ClinicalDocument.title: C-CDA R2.1 Patient Record: Isaiah615 Bartoletti50

section.title: Allergies
section.text: There are no current allergies at the time of this document's creation.

tr.td: Amoxicillin 250 MG / Clavulanate 125 MG Oral Tablet
sulfamethoxazole 800 MG / trimethoprim 160 MG Oral Tablet
